findings.location: s3 — code example (生成するクラス側)
findings.description: The class implementation example omits the surrounding Objective-C class structure: `@implementation NMAesEncryption`, `@synthesize nmMode;`, `@synthesize nmPaddingType;`, and `@end`. The source shows a complete class skeleton demonstrating that the target class must declare and synthesize properties (`nmMode`, `nmPaddingType`) alongside the `initWithDictionary:` method. Developers implementing a compatible class need to know that property declarations are required.
